title: koeleria latifrons
intro: Koeleria latifrons, also known as broad-leaved June grass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria latifrons include soothing respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Koeleria latifrons is commonly prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and in some cases, it is used to make a decoction or tincture for its medicinal properties.
